texto: Rating a book don't judge the book.It all depends upon the observation of the reader and how much he/she is free to be what he/she is in reality.Perceptions and observations will change according to what you have within and so the learning and the conclusion.The same thought you heard an year before and your conclusion in that regards may be different but after some time the same thought but totally new conclusion...How really important we are-Surprised!!Blessed!
explicacao: Citação de AS sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Rating a book don't judge the book.It all depends upon the observation of the reader and how much…” articula sabedoria, experience, learning em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e termino.
